form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently won by a 0.5 len at this track April 1 over 2000m defeating Kafkaesque with 53.5kg at $6.50. Before that 2nd of 13 at this track on March 18 over 2000m, 6 len behind Efe Mete Bey carrying 56.5kg at $14.50. Big chance to go back-to-back.

Before that 2nd of 13 at this track on March 18 over 2000m, 6 len behind Efe Mete Bey carrying 56.5kg at $14.50. Big chance to go back-to-back.

form.formComment: Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign when last of 7 at Yesiloba November 9 over 1300m, 15 len behind Kilic Kizi with 60kg at $5.35. Previously first up; second of 10 at this track April 12 2025 over 1400m, 1.5 len behind Nergizli carrying 54kg at $3.70. Expected to play a major role.

form.formComment: Last start 6th of 8 at this track on April 1 over 2000m, 18 len behind Subike with 57.5kg at $1.80. The race before that 4th of 11 at this track on March 14 over 1400m, 2 len behind Belkis Ana with 56kg at $1.95. Expected to finish much closer.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Last start 6th of 8 at this track on April 1 over 2000m, 18 len behind Subike with 57.5kg at $1.80. The race before that 4th of 11 at this track on March 14 over 1400m, 2 len behind Belkis Ana with 56kg at $1.95. Expected to finish much closer.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of six-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation second of 8 at Veliefendi October 1 over 2100m, soft track; 4 len behind Kilicasli carrying 57kg at $8.30. When resuming last campaign second of 8 at this track April 5 2025 over 1300m, 2 len behind Ustunkiz with 57.5kg at $13. Anticipate a bold showing.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of six-and-a-half months. When resuming last campaign second of 8 at this track April 5 2025 over 1300m, 2 len behind Ustunkiz with 57.5kg at $13. Anticipate a bold showing.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 47-day let-up. Last start second last of 9 at Antalya on February 27 over 1300m, 14 len behind Gozpinari with 56kg at $17.30. The run before that ran last of 7 at this track on February 11 over 1200m, 39 len behind Ak Filozof carrying 57kg at $33.80. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.

form.formComment: Returns from a 32-day let-up. At the latest run ran last of 11 at this track on March 14 over 1400m, 23 len behind Belkis Ana carrying 56kg at $32.20. The race before that 7th of 11 at this track on February 7 over 1400m, 22 len behind Minik Anne with 57.5kg at $23.40. Win would surprise.

form.formComment: Resuming after a seven months break. Finished off last campaign seventh of 9 at this track September 17 over 2100m, 25 len behind Kocek carrying 57.5kg at $10.35. On debut third of 12 at Yesiloba April 16 2024 over 1000m, 10 len behind Julidekiz carrying 55kg at $4.30. Returns in a winnable race.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months ran last of 8 at this track on April 1 over 2000m, 57 len behind Subike with 56.5kg at $18.15. Previously second-up 8th of 12 at Veliefendi on August 4 2023 over 1400m, 17 len behind Celik Murat with 55kg at $44.25. Unlikely to threaten.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 5th of 11 at this track on March 14 over 1400m, 3 len behind Belkis Ana carrying 56kg at $9. Previously second-up 6th of 12 at Veliefendi on September 19 over 1600m, 9 len behind Murekkep Yurek with 59kg at $3.40. Likely improver.
